message:
feat(pubsub): expand pub/sub command handling and conformance coverage

Enhance fr-command pub/sub dispatch with improved pattern matching and
subscription management (~80 lines). Expand core_pubsub.json conformance
fixtures with additional edge case scenarios. Add pub/sub state helpers
in fr-store for subscription tracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
